assertions.title: Gap Detection Section Visible on Health Page

steps.expected: Gap detection section visible
steps.observed: Page rendered only overall banner plus 定量/定性 freshness tables

steps.expected: 200 with gap payload
steps.observed: Endpoint returned 404 {"detail":"Not Found"}

assertions.issues: No gap detection section exists in UI and backend gaps endpoint is missing.

assertions.title: Gap Detection Backend Cross-References Trade Calendar

steps.action: Inspect src/api/routes_health.py for a gaps handler
steps.expected: Gap detection endpoint exists and references trade_calendar
steps.observed: routes_health.py only exposes /freshness, /data, /unified; no trade_calendar gap logic found

assertions.issues: Gap detection backend is not implemented, so no trade_calendar cross-reference exists.

assertions.title: Per-Stock Drill-Down Shows Individual Symbol Status

steps.expected: Per-stock rows with symbol code, name, freshness, gap count
steps.observed: UI shows only aggregate source rows such as 股票日K/指数日K; no per-stock list or drill-down

assertions.title: Per-Stock Drill-Down Handles ~1000 Stocks

steps.action: Look for search/filter/pagination or stock list on /health
steps.expected: Usable mechanism to locate a specific stock among ~1000 symbols
steps.observed: No stock list or search/filter controls specific to health data are present

assertions.issues: Feature not present; cannot assess large-list handling because no per-stock view exists.

assertions.title: Recent Failures Section Shows DataUpdateLog Entries

steps.expected: Recent failures section visible
steps.observed: No failures section rendered

steps.expected: 200 with failure entries or empty state
steps.observed: Endpoint returned 404 {"detail":"Not Found"}

assertions.issues: Recent failures surface is missing in both UI and API.

assertions.title: Recent Failures Limited and Ordered by Recency

steps.expected: Query with ORDER BY started_at DESC and LIMIT
steps.observed: No failures endpoint/query exists in routes_health.py

assertions.issues: Cannot limit or sort recent failures because endpoint is absent.

assertions.title: Data Consistency Section Shows Validation Results

steps.expected: Consistency section with rate, item count, inconsistencies
steps.observed: No consistency section rendered

steps.expected: 200 consistency payload
steps.observed: Endpoint returned 404 {"detail":"Not Found"}

assertions.issues: Consistency validation is not wired to UI or API.

assertions.title: Data Consistency Does Not Block Page Load

steps.action: Inspect frontend health component load flow
steps.expected: Other sections load first and consistency loads asynchronously
steps.observed: Component performs a single fetch to /api/health/unified and has no separate async consistency request

assertions.issues: The required consistency section is absent rather than asynchronously loaded.

assertions.title: Browser Notification Permission Requested

steps.action: Load /health and inspect page code/runtime state
steps.expected: Notification.requestPermission() invoked on first visit
steps.observed: Frontend code contains no Notification.requestPermission call; runtime Notification.permission remained 'denied' with no prompt/request behavior observed

assertions.issues: Notification permission request logic is missing.

steps.expected: Status transition logic using useRef and notification firing
steps.observed: Component imports only useState/useEffect/useCallback; no useRef or notification logic present

assertions.title: Trade Calendar Health Section Visible

steps.expected: Trade calendar coverage section with date range and count
steps.observed: No trade calendar coverage section displayed

assertions.issues: Trade calendar health is absent from the dashboard.

steps.expected: 定量数据源 and 定性数据源 tables render with status icons and data
steps.observed: Both aggregate tables rendered successfully with rows, timestamps, status icons, and counts

steps.expected: Auto-refresh triggers new requests and updates timestamp
steps.observed: Top timestamp advanced from 12:45:11 to 12:47:11 and network tracker showed two GET /api/health/unified requests

evidence.network: GET /api/health/unified fired at least twice during observation

assertions.title: Overall Status Banner Reflects All Health Dimensions

steps.action: Inspect backend status logic and UI binding
steps.expected: Overall status includes gap count, consistency, and calendar health
steps.observed: UI banner is driven only by unified.status from /api/health/unified, and backend overall is computed from quant/qual freshness states only; no gap/consistency/calendar inputs exist

assertions.issues: Overall banner ignores required health dimensions because they are not implemented.

assertions.title: Health Page Handles Backend Errors Gracefully

steps.action: Attempt to validate behavior when one new endpoint fails
steps.expected: Single section error while rest of page renders
steps.observed: The required new endpoints (/api/health/gaps, /failures, /consistency) already return 404 and corresponding sections do not exist, so isolated section-level error handling cannot be exercised

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing endpoint/section implementation; no granular error-handling path to test.

assertions.title: Health Page Navigable from Main Navigation

steps.expected: 健康 button visible in main navigation
steps.observed: Top navigation included a ❤️ 健康 button

steps.expected: Navigate to /health
steps.observed: Browser navigated to http://localhost:5173/health

assertions.title: Health Dashboard Shows Zero Gaps for Backfilled Period

steps.expected: Gap report for backfilled period
steps.observed: Endpoint returned 404 and no gap data is available

steps.expected: UI shows clean/zero-gap state or gaps summary
steps.observed: Dashboard has no gap section at all

assertions.issues: Cannot show zero-gap backfill health because gap detection surface is missing.

assertions.title: Extended Calendar Powers Gap Detection

steps.action: Inspect health routes for gap detection query
steps.expected: Gap detection checks trade_calendar from 2021 onward
steps.observed: No gap detection query or /api/health/gaps handler exists; no use of trade_calendar for health gaps was found

assertions.issues: Extended calendar is not wired into any implemented gap detection endpoint.

frictions.description: The validation contract references /api/health/gaps, /api/health/failures, and /api/health/consistency, but the running API only exposes /api/health/freshness, /api/health/data, and /api/health/unified.
frictions.resolution: Confirmed actual available endpoints through openapi.json and adapted validation to mark missing surfaces as failures/blockers.

frictions.description: agent-browser network tracker initially showed no requests even after page navigation.
frictions.resolution: Used page text timestamps plus a second network-requests check after waiting >60 seconds to confirm auto-refresh behavior.

blockers.description: Required health-dashboard subsections and backing endpoints for gaps, failures, and consistency are not implemented in the running app/API.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified live routes, OpenAPI schema, frontend rendering, and source files to distinguish missing implementation from transient runtime failure.

summary: Tested 18 assertions: 3 passed, 14 failed, 1 blocked. The current /health page only provides aggregate freshness tables via /api/health/unified; gap detection, failures, consistency, calendar health, and notification features required by the contract are missing.
